title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Go-based CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage local LLMs (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a single command.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official TypeScript/JavaScript client for Ollama; chat, stream, and embed from Node or browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client; generate, chat, embed, and list models with a few lines of code.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLMs or embeddings in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compat).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; generate, chat, pull, and delete models from JVM apps.

title: ollama-cli-csharp
summary: .NET/C# client with async streaming, chat, and embeddings support for Ollama.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing typed APIs to chat, generate, and manage Ollama models.

title: ollama-hass-addon
summary: Home Assistant add-on to run Ollama locally and expose models as conversation agents.

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: GPT4All chat UI that added Ollama backend support; run any Ollama model in a Qt desktop app.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Docker-compose stack bundling Ollama, WebUI, and optional NVIDIA runtime for quick local labs.

title: ollama-model-registry
summary: Official library of community-contributed Modelfiles (Llama 3, CodeLlama, Mistral, etc.).

title: ollama-rag-langchain
summary: Template repo showing RAG with Ollama embeddings, Chroma, and LangChain in 50 lines.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Python Discord bot that proxies chat to a local Ollama instance with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot using Bolt JS to chat with any Ollama model in channels or DMs.

title: ollama-obsidian-plugin
summary: Obsidian community plugin to summarize notes, brainstorm, or Q&A using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve example deploying Ollama for scalable local inference across GPUs.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation to build and run Ollama declaratively on NixOS with CUDA support.

title: r/ollama - Reddit community
summary: Active subreddit for sharing models, troubleshooting, and showcasing Ollama projects.
